seoTitle: Clifden vs Cliftleigh — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clifden and Cliftleigh. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clifden and Cliftleigh.
heading: Clifden vs Cliftleigh — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clifden, New South Wales and Cliftleigh, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cliftleigh has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Clifden (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clifden or Cliftleigh safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clifden has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Cliftleigh scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clifden scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Cliftleigh scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clifden or Cliftleigh?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cliftleigh has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
